dismissalText.commentary: Pathum Nissanka c †Prabhsimran Singh b Arshdeep Singh 11 (7b 2x4 0x6 13m) SR: 157.14

dismissalComment.html: Rahul dropped, Nissanka not. Outswinger on a slight back of length, pace on. Finished around off stump, Nissanka looked to pull it again. He did that to similar balls to get a couple of boundaries earlier but this time, the bat face opened up and the ball went right up. Prabhsimran runs in a couple of steps and takes it

dismissalText.commentary: Nitish Rana c Iyer b Bartlett 91 (44b 11x4 4x6 90m) SR: 206.81

dismissalComment.html: got him!! Rana misses out on a hundred. Iyer, at mid-off, does well to move and reach out to his right. He takes it high, and ends a massive stand. Bartlett angled one in, and bowled a low full toss outside leg. Rana backed away and looked to loft, but couldn't break through the in field

dismissalText.commentary: Nitish Rana c Iyer b Bartlett 91 (44b 11x4 4x6 90m) SR: 206.81

dismissalComment.html: got him!! Rana misses out on a hundred. Iyer, at mid-off, does well to move and reach out to his right. He takes it high, and ends a massive stand. Bartlett angled one in, and bowled a low full toss outside leg. Rana backed away and looked to loft, but couldn't break through the in field

dismissalText.commentary: Prabhsimran Singh lbw b Kuldeep Yadav 76 (26b 9x4 5x6 63m) SR: 292.3

dismissalComment.html: Low bounce and that looked out. Did it pitch in line? Seemed like it. Prabh and Connolly chat, review taken. 86ks shortish ball at middle. Prabhsimran's back leg was just outside off and front leg just outside leg as the ball went under the pull shot and hit him just over the front pad. The short ball landed in line with middle stump and would go on to hit top of middle and leg. Three reds, Prabhsimran grimaces as high-fives take over
